report.summary: Test suite generated for new feature branch. Coverage analysis shows 94% line coverage with 534 tests passing, 0 failures, 3 ignored. Edge cases covered: null inputs, boundary conditions, concurrent access.
actions: Generated 12 new unit tests for feature X
Added property-based tests for edge cases
Updated CI gate to enforce 90% coverage threshold
Documented test patterns in TESTING.md
risks: Risk: Integration tests may be flaky on Windows due to file locking
Coverage drops to 87% when excluding integration tests

report.summary: Multi-agent review completed for PR #142. Reviewer agent flagged 3 issues: unsafe unwrap in line 45, missing error propagation in async block, magic number 42 without constant. Resolver agent addressed all issues with targeted fixes. Final review score: 9.2/10.
actions: Replaced unwrap with proper error handling
Added ? operator for error propagation
Extracted magic number to named constant MAX_RETRIES
Re-ran clippy and tests post-fix

report.summary: Closed-loop retry executed for flaky integration test. Initial pass rate: 82%. After 3 retry iterations with incremental fixes (increased timeout, added retry logic, stabilized temp dir cleanup), pass rate reached 96%. Loop terminated successfully.
actions: Iteration 1: Increased test timeout from 30s to 60s
Iteration 2: Added exponential backoff retry for network calls
Iteration 3: Fixed race condition in temp directory cleanup
Updated CI config to allow 3 retry attempts
risks: Retry masking underlying instability - root cause not fully addressed
CI time increased by 15% due to retry overhead

report.summary: Regression test suite detected breaking change in workflow engine. State store serialization format changed without backward compatibility. 4 tests failing in backward-compat module.
actions: Identified breaking change in WorkflowInstance schema v2
Added migration path from v1 to v2 format
Created backward-compat shim for legacy state files
Added regression test to prevent future breaks
risks: Migration may fail for corrupted state files

report.summary: Eval loop automation configured for release pipeline. Dataset: .agents/evals/release_eval.json. Target: 95% pass rate. Current: 94.2% after latest changes. Gap: 0.8% due to 2 failing tests on Windows platform.
actions: Automated eval loop runs on every PR merge
Windows-specific test failures isolated to path separators
Added cross-platform normalization for path comparisons
Gate configured: block merge if eval < 95%
risks: Timeout risk: Windows CI runner occasionally times out on eval loop
0.8% gap may require test adjustments rather than code fixes
